name: tuturuuu
description: Codex operating guidance, CLI support, validation, CI, and focused workflows for the Tuturuuu platform monorepo.

interface.shortDescription: Keep Tuturuuu platform work aligned with repo conventions.
interface.longDescription: Provides Codex skills for safe Tuturuuu platform development, including repo-wide workflow rules, shared worktree coordination, native ttr CLI install and SDK-backed workflows, finance CRUD and pagination commands, ttr-first task capture, Flutter mobile task-board guidance, Supabase database patterns, CI/docs maintenance, review-comment follow-through, plugin validation, and incremental tooling improvements.
defaultPrompt: Make this platform change in the shared worktree and run the checks it needs.
Add an SDK-backed ttr command and verify its scoped help.
Add this as a Tuturuuu task with the ttr CLI.
Update the Supabase schema or API write path safely.
Fix this Flutter task-board behavior and verify it.
Update the docs or CI workflow and validate the follow-through.
Clear the unresolved review comments on this PR.
Improve this shared agent workflow for future agents.
